title: Why we picked Supabase over Firebase
snippet: Migrated from Firebase to Supabase last sprint. Performance and DX improvements are real but onboarding ramp was steeper.
body: Migrated from Firebase to Supabase last sprint. Performance and DX improvements are real but onboarding ramp was steeper.
author: dev@mastodon.social1

title: Firebase still has the edge for baas workflows
snippet: Tried Supabase for a month. Firebase's ecosystem and reliability still win for production baas workloads.
body: Tried Supabase for a month. Firebase's ecosystem and reliability still win for production baas workloads.
author: dev@mastodon.social2
